lead_level_notes.notes: OSF e5nvr paper-, experiment-, and effect-level final-analysis tables, dictionaries, and per-study R scripts are child artifacts under RP:CB.

next_action: Attach the OSF e5nvr final-analysis tables, dictionaries, and per-study R scripts to raw_corpus:rpcb; deduplicate against the local rpcb corpus-candidate copies in the sibling RPCB cluster.
preferred_source_family_name: Reproducibility Project: Cancer Biology (RP:CB) final analysis data
reason: The cluster is a coherent OSF final-analysis package for RP:CB, with paper-, experiment-, and effect-level data plus dictionaries and study scripts. RP:CB is an existing reusable corpus/source family, so these are child artifacts of that parent rather than new source families.
